economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Amik-BBF HydroKap LP, Amik-CTR HydroKap LP, 2454357 Ontario Inc., Three Nations Drilling LP, and Exiro Minerals Corp. Significant resource revenue of $4,133,019 (down from $6,830,802 prior year). COFN TLE trust distributions of $606,569. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions of $564,860.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) The Chapleau Ojibwe First Nation Treaty Land Entitlement Trust created in 2017 has not been consolidated as required under PSAS - effect on financials cannot be quantified; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not adopted as required from April 1, 2022 - management has not completed assessment so impact cannot be quantified. Demand loans of $111,572 for vehicles are classified in current liabilities. Schedule of Remuneration was prepared as a separate Review Engagement Report and remuneration figures are not included in the financial statement text provided. total_government_transfers includes ISC $618,438 + Wabun Tribal Council $371,905 + Nishnawbe-Aski Nation $102,053 + Province of Ontario $150,000 + OFNLP $564,860 = $1,807,256. OFNLP treated as government transfer as it is a First Nations government partnership distribution. Resource revenue declined significantly from $6.8M to $4.1M year over year.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
